hero.subheadline: Breadbot scans Solana and Base for high-scoring meme coin opportunities, monitors stablecoin yields across six platforms, and executes flash loan arbs — all from a browser dashboard you control from your phone. Run it in Manual mode and approve each trade, or switch to Auto and let your strategy execute while you sleep. Change modes anytime from your phone.
hero.trust_1: Your funds never leave Coinbase or Kraken — trade-only API access

features.subheadline: Every system runs simultaneously and writes to a single SQLite database. Every alert, trade decision, yield reading, and arb attempt — permanently logged.
features.scanner_desc: Polls DEXScreener every five minutes across Solana and Base. Every candidate passes through GoPlus and RugCheck before an alert reaches your phone. Honeypots, blacklist functions, and suspicious ownership patterns are filtered before you ever see them.
features.yield_desc: Checks APY across Coinbase, Aave V3, Coinbase Morpho, and Kraken every hour. Saves every reading to a local database and alerts you when any rate moves more than 0.5%. Builds a yield history you can chart and reference when allocating capital.
features.flash_desc: Borrows USDC from Aave V3, swaps to WETH on Uniswap V3, swaps back on Aerodrome, repays Aave, and keeps the spread — all in one transaction. If the minimum profit threshold is not met, the entire transaction reverts. No capital at risk on failed arbs.
features.auto_desc: Approve every trade yourself, or set a strategy and let Breadbot execute automatically. Conservative, Balanced, and Aggressive presets control exactly which tokens qualify. Your daily loss limit acts as an automatic circuit breaker no matter which mode you choose.

dashboard_preview.subheadline: Run it on your Mac, a VPS, or anywhere Python runs. Every number updates live from the same database the bot writes to.
dashboard_preview.list_5: Pause, resume, edit risk params from the browser

how_it_works.subheadline: One pip command, one .env file, one terminal window to start. Everything after that is Telegram and a browser.
how_it_works.step_1_desc: Python 3.11 and a single pip install -r requirements.txt. Runs on Mac, Windows, or any Linux VPS.
how_it_works.step_2_desc: Fill in your .env file — Telegram token, exchange API keys, risk parameters. The setup guide walks through every field.
how_it_works.step_3_desc: python main.py starts all three systems. A startup message to your Telegram confirms it's live.
how_it_works.step_4_desc: Approve trades, check yields, pause the bot, edit risk limits — all from Telegram or the browser dashboard.

auto_mode.subheadline: Three steps between your strategy and fully automatic execution. Every trade still respects your daily loss limit and stop-loss settings.
auto_mode.step_1_desc: Choose Conservative, Balanced, or Aggressive. Each preset defines the minimum security score and market cap range a token must hit before the bot executes automatically.
auto_mode.step_2_desc: Breadbot polls DEXScreener every 5 minutes. Each new token is scored against 15 automated security checks. Only tokens that pass your preset thresholds are executed — everything else is ignored or sent for manual review.
auto_mode.step_3_desc: Every auto-executed trade sends a Telegram notification instantly: token name, entry price, amount, and your updated position count. Your configured stop-loss is set at the same moment.

pricing.subheadline: Full source code. No subscriptions, no usage limits. Deploy anywhere and run it as long as you want.
pricing.feature_auto_execution: Auto-execution with Conservative / Balanced / Aggressive strategy presets
pricing.renewal_note: Optional annual renewal at $497/yr keeps you current on updates, new exchange connectors, and ongoing support. Never required to keep running what you already have.

faq.headline: Common questions.
faq.q1: Can Breadbot access or withdraw my funds?
faq.a1: No. Breadbot connects using read-and-trade-only API keys. It can see balances and place trades but cannot move funds anywhere. Withdraw and Transfer permissions are never requested during setup. Your exchange credentials remain on your own machine in an encrypted .env file that only you control.
faq.q2: Is it safe to let a bot trade for me?
faq.a2: In many ways safer than manual trading. Breadbot follows your rules exactly — no panic selling, no FOMO buying. Every trade respects position size limits, and the daily loss circuit breaker pauses everything automatically if losses reach your threshold. You can override, pause, or stop with one click anytime.
faq.q3: What happens if the market crashes while my bot is running?
faq.a3: Breadbot has two automatic protection layers. Every position includes a stop-loss that exits if the token drops to your configured level. The daily loss limit pauses all trading if total losses hit your threshold, default 5% of portfolio. You receive a Telegram notification the moment either triggers.
faq.q4: Do I need trading experience to use Breadbot?
faq.a4: No. Start with the Balanced strategy preset which has sensible defaults for everything. The dashboard explains every metric in plain English with help icons. A guided walkthrough runs the first time you open the dashboard and covers every important section in about three minutes.
faq.a5: About five minutes from purchase to first live scan. The setup wizard walks you through connecting exchange API keys, linking Telegram for alerts, and confirming risk settings. The bot sends a Telegram message the moment it goes live confirming everything worked correctly.
faq.q6: Can I try it without risking real money?
faq.a6: Yes. Paper trading mode runs the full scanner and shows alerts and decisions exactly as they would appear live, but no real trades are placed. Use paper mode to get comfortable with the dashboard and verify your strategy settings before switching to live trading.
faq.q7: What is the difference between Manual and Auto mode?
faq.a7: In Manual mode, Breadbot finds qualifying tokens, runs security checks, and sends a Telegram message with Buy or Skip buttons. Nothing executes without your approval. In Auto mode, tokens passing your configured security score and market cap thresholds execute immediately. Daily loss limits work identically in both modes.
faq.q8: What does the security score mean?
faq.a8: A 100-point score summarizing automated rug pull checks on every new token. It starts at 100 and loses points for specific red flags: sell tax above 5%, pausable contracts, changeable balances, concentrated ownership. Tokens scoring below 50 never reach you. Each alert shows exactly which checks deducted points.
faq.q9: How much do I need to invest?
faq.a9: There is no minimum required by Breadbot. Default settings are designed for $1,000–$10,000 accounts with each trade capped at 2% of portfolio. On a $1,000 account that means $20 per trade. The bot works on any account size with proportional position scaling.
faq.a10: No one can guarantee profits in crypto. Breadbot executes consistently, removes emotional decisions, and filters out most low-quality tokens automatically — but markets can move against any position. Start with paper trading and only invest money you can afford to lose. The 30-day money-back guarantee lets you evaluate risk-free.
faq.a11: Coinbase Advanced Trade and Kraken for live trading. Solana and Base DEX pairs are monitored via DEXScreener for scanner alerts but executed through your connected CEX accounts. Yield monitoring covers Coinbase, Aave V3, Morpho, and Kraken. Additional exchange support is in development.
faq.q12: Can I stop, pause, or change settings anytime?
faq.a12: Yes to all three. Pause trading instantly from Telegram with /pause or from the Controls page — the bot stops immediately. Resume the same way with /resume. Change risk settings, strategy, and execution mode anytime from Controls, with changes taking effect on the next scan cycle. No lock-in periods.
